news.t: The timing may be perfect for this dividend-stock fund if the market is getting close to a top
These 2 dividend-stock ETFs are more like growth funds in disguise. Can either still work in your income portfolio?
Opal Capital Launches, Bringing a Modern Approach to Dividend Investing

holdings.infoBox: DIVZ is an equity ETF with a total of 31 individual holdings. The top holdings are Philip Morris International stock at 5.76%, UnitedHealth Group at 5.75%, Verizon Communications at 5.66%, MPLX LP at 5.57%, and NextEra Energy at 4.62%.

overview.description: The Polen Dividend Income ETF (DIVZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund holds an actively-managed, concentrated portfolio of US-listed companies that are favorably valued and have attractive dividends. The fund also seeks to deliver lower volatility than the overall market. DIVZ was launched on Jan 27, 2021 and is issued by Polen.
